_description: Wire shape for the `fundSettings` sub-object of the TB createReports body (POST workbench-api/v1/trialbalancereport/createReports). Fund scoping applies to fund engagements (governmental / NFP) ONLY. JE reports (POST /v1/JournalEntryReport) carry fundSettings in the body but expose no fund options in the UI, so leave it null.
_captured: 2026-05-30, live on Claude Playground (clientId 100173, engId 390765, guid bcc7acba-9c30-4a33-b35a-62b9f091e01d) via in-page XHR interceptor on real Create-Report-from-TB saves.
_builder: scripts.reports.build_fund_settings(funds) emits exactly these shapes; validated byte-for-byte against the captured POSTs and live through the deployed skill 2026-05-31 (all 3 selection modes POST 200).

fundOptions._doc: Fund layout - INERT. Pinned to the constant 'fundsInRows'. CCH ignores the value: it does NOT round-trip (absent from the saved report definition, GET tbreportedit) and the report always renders funds in rows. The UI Funds tab has no rows/columns toggle (include-all / include-selected / do-not-include only). 'fundsInColumns' does nothing - confirmed inert 2026-05-31 (created two reports differing only in fundOptions; saved definitions were byte-identical and both rendered funds-in-rows). The `fund_layout` builder param was removed.

_readback_note: The saved definition (GET tbreportedit/{clientId}/{engGuid}/{reportGuid}) echoes fundSettings WITHOUT fundOptions and capitalizes the flag as 'includeCurrentAndFutureFunds' (capital A) vs the lowercase 'includeCurrentandFutureFunds' we send on create - the create endpoint accepts our lowercase (200, persists true).

modes._doc: Three mutually-exclusive boolean flags, mirroring the group includeSelected/includeCurrentandFuture pattern. fundsIncluded carries internal fundId values (scripts.funds.list_funds -> 'id' / fundaccountmap).

no_funds_normal_tb._doc: Explicitly run a fund engagement as a normal (non-fund) TB. NOT the same as omitting fundSettings, though for commercial engagements omitting (null) is the legacy/default path.

omit._doc: Default. build_fund_settings('default'/None) returns null -> fundSettings omitted. Correct for non-fund commercial engagements.
